## Definition of Done
A fix is done when **all** of the following are satisfied:
 
- [ ] Issue is identified and understood
- [ ] Fix is implemented
- [ ] Fix is tested (if code fix)
- [ ] Code follows style guide (if applicable)
- [ ] No new issues introduced
- [ ] Code review is complete and approved
- [ ] Branch is merged to `main`
